description: Paths that the Step 4c state-drift gate (#2404) always protects. A sub-issue touching one of these requires the issue body to name the file explicitly (under Files to modify: or in a previously-logged Files Changed section) or carry a `Scope-Override: <reason>` line in the most recent commit message or an issue comment.

paths.reason: Per-project configuration; accidental edits break charter integrity and skill enforcement.
Versioned framework deployment contract; off-band edits desync dist + PHM consumers.
Schema-driven registries (extension points, recipes, criteria, signals); silent drift here breaks downstream consumers without test coverage.
Project-board configuration; accidental edits break GitHub Workflow integration.
Integrity seal for .gh-pmu.json; must only change when the config it seals also changes.
Project charter; out-of-scope edits drift from the project's stated vision and current focus.
